summary: Iteration 97 - Claret AI Onboarding Module Testing Complete. All features verified working: 1) GET /api/claret/onboarding-questions returns 7 MCQ + 3 open questions in English/Hinglish/Manglish. 2) GET /api/claret/profile returns null for new users, saved data for existing. 3) POST /api/claret/profile saves profile with name, nickname, language, personality answers. 4) POST /api/claret/chat accepts user_role and returns personalized response in user's language. 5) Onboarding modal appears when clicking settings gear icon. 6) MCQ questions shown one-at-a-time with auto-advance. 7) Open-ended questions shown one-at-a-time. 8) Claret responds in Hinglish when configured. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 97 verified Claret AI Onboarding Module. Key findings: 1) Onboarding questions endpoint (/api/claret/onboarding-questions) does NOT require auth - returns 7 MCQ + 3 open questions in 3 languages (english, hinglish, manglish). 2) Profile endpoint (/api/claret/profile) requires auth - server enforces user_id = authenticated user's ID for security. 3) Chat endpoint (/api/claret/chat) accepts user_role parameter and uses it for ERP data access control. 4) Frontend ClaretOnboardingModal.jsx shows intro step (name, nickname, language), then MCQ one-at-a-time with auto-advance, then open-ended one-at-a-time. 5) Settings gear icon in chat header re-opens onboarding for profile updates. 6) Claret responds in user's chosen language (verified Hinglish response). 7) Claret widget positioned at bottom-LEFT (x=24px).

onboarding_questions_english.details: GET /api/claret/onboarding-questions?language=english returns 7 MCQ + 3 open questions. Each MCQ has 'q' and 'options' fields with 5 options.

onboarding_questions_hinglish.details: GET /api/claret/onboarding-questions?language=hinglish returns questions in Hinglish. First MCQ: 'Kaam mein aapko sabse zyada kya drive karta hai?'

onboarding_questions_manglish.details: GET /api/claret/onboarding-questions?language=manglish returns questions in Manglish. First MCQ: 'Work-il ninnaye eath aanu ettavum drive cheyyunnathu?'

profile_null_for_new_user.details: GET /api/claret/profile?user_id=<random_id> returns {profile: null} for users without a profile.

profile_save_and_retrieve.details: POST /api/claret/profile saves profile with name, nickname, language, answers. GET returns saved data correctly. Upsert works for updates.

chat_with_user_role.details: POST /api/claret/chat accepts user_role parameter. Tested with super_admin and cs_head roles. Returns personalized AI response.

chat_erp_data_query.details: Chat endpoint queries ERP data when user asks about leads/students. Uses role-based access control via ROLE_ERP_ACCESS mapping.

onboarding_modal_ui.details: ClaretOnboardingModal shows: intro step (name, nickname, language selection), MCQ step (one question at a time with auto-advance), open-ended step (one at a time), completion step.

settings_reopens_onboarding.details: Settings gear icon in Claret chat header opens onboarding modal for profile re-configuration.

language_personalization.details: After selecting Hinglish, Claret responds in Hinglish: 'Arre Boss! Main toh ekdum mast hoon, shukriya! 🌟'

claret_widget_position.details: Claret widget button positioned at bottom-LEFT (x=24, y=1000). Changed from right-6 to left-6 in previous iteration.
